task_completion.description: Enter the new shift ID and name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an 'Add Shift' or similar form with 'SURVEY_EVE' entered in the Shift ID field and 'Evening Survey Block' in the Shift Name field.

task_completion.description: Set the shift start time and length
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Shift Start Time field set to '1700' and the Shift Length field set to '0500'.

task_completion.description: Enable the shift for all weekdays
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the settings for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday enabled (e.g., checkboxes ticked or dropdowns set to 'Y').
Screenshots show a success message confirming the shift was added, or the 'SURVEY_EVE' shift is visible in the list of existing shifts.

task_completion.description: Navigate to modify the SURVEY user group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the User Group modification page specifically for the 'SURVEY' (Survey Team) user group.

task_completion.description: Set shift enforcement to ALL for the user group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Shift Enforcement' setting for the SURVEY user group changed to 'ALL'.

task_completion.description: Assign the new shift to the user group's allowed shifts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'SURVEY_EVE' selected in the 'Allowed Shifts' list or explicitly added to the allowed shifts configuration for the SURVEY user group, followed by saving the changes.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the administration interface, rather than using terminal commands like curl or direct API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine administration web panel (e.g., Vicidial), not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct SQL queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL prompts or direct database INSERT/UPDATE commands being executed to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Shift ID: 'SURVEY_EVE'. Target Group ID: 'SURVEY'. Expected Start Time: '1700'. Expected Shift Length: '0500'. Expected Enforcement Level: 'ALL'. The agent must configure these settings via the administration web interface, ensuring the shift applies to all weekdays and is assigned to the SURVEY user group.
